item.title: $7.25 An Hour Since 2009. 1460% CEO Pay Increase Since 1978. These Are Not Market Outcomes. These Are Fucking Choices.
item.description: Robert Reich identifies a contradiction so fundamental it has persisted for centuries. Capital has always found sophisticated justifications for why workers must sacrifice while executives are compensated at ratios that would have been considered obscene by any prior standard of human civilization. ? The federal minimum wage is $7.25. It has not changed since 2009. CEO compensation has increased 1,460% since 1978. Workers' wages have grown 18% in the same period. These are not market outcomes. These are policy choices made by people who benefit from them. ?? Keep them poor. Keep them sick. Keep them stupid. Control the women. This is not conspiracy. This is documented legislative history. Every item on that list has been attempted, many successfully, by one political coalition over fifty years of sustained class warfare from above. ⚖️ Pete Hegseth spent $6.9 million on lobster tail while families lost SNAP benefits. The war costs $11.3 billion per week without congressional authorization. And we are told we cannot afford $15 an hour. The arithmetic is not complicated. The intention is. ???? #MinimumWage #CEOPay #ClassWarfare #WorkingClass #RobertReich #EconomicInequality #WageTheft #SNAP #FollowTheMoney
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Serious momentum, my dudes. Gonna keep it going, full steam.
item.description:
Longest I have gone without a drink since my momma passed roughly a year ago. She was always worried about my drinking and one of the last conversations I had with her before she passed was about how I had been 3 weeks sober (at the time. Gonna keep doing this for me but also for my Momma’s memory.
Have some Cheddar Bae Biscuit tax. He’s at the vet and unhappy at the moment.
item.dc:creator: BobWeAdaBabyEetsAboy

item.title: Turns out I am quitting smoking
item.description: Wasn't even planned tbh. Side effect of some meds that took away 95% of the cravings. So I just decided to take on the remaining 5% and here we are. I kind of hope it sticks. I don't want to tell anyone in my life yet, in case I fail, but wanted to post here. Edit: Most viral?! Unreal. I may cry. Thank you all for all the warmth. Truly, I feel the love.
item.dc:creator: anonymouschameleon8

item.title: Goodbye to one of the greats
item.description: This is a little late since it happened back on Feb 15th. Ida was responsible for the Castlevania boom in the early to mid 2ks. He worked as programmer on Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow and Castlevania: Lament of Innocence in 2003; on Castlevania: Dawn of Sorrow in 2005; on Castlevania: Portrait of Ruin in 2006; on Castlevania: Order of Ecclesia in 2008; and as Level Designer on Castlevania: Harmony of Despair in 2010. Most recently, Iida worked as part of Koji Igarashi's team on the Castlevania spiritual successor title, Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night.
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost

item.title: Barreleye fish . Credit to Deep Sea Town
item.dc:creator: MedicalScience

item.title: The Woman Who Shapes US Immigration Policy Learned About Digital Permanence The Hard Way
item.description: Laura Fucking Loomer flew to India. Before she left she deleted THOUSANDS of anti-Indian tweets. Every single one. Scrubbed. Gone. She thought nobody would notice. An Indian uncle with a phone and a LONG memory noticed. He read them back to her. Every one. On camera. In her face. ??? Let's be very clear about what happened. This cunt who shaped US immigration policy from Mar-a-Lago's pool deck, who has the President's personal cell number, flew to a country she spent years publicly degrading and thought she could just DELETE THE EVIDENCE BEFORE CROSSING THE BORDER. ?? The DELETE button does not work the bitch thinks it works. The internet is not a napkin. You cannot wipe your mouth and pretend the meal didn't happen. THOUSANDS of tweets. Gone. Except they weren't gone. They were in an Indian uncle's PHONE. At a live conference. On camera. ??? This is the woman with the President's cell number. This is the woman who helped write immigration policy. She deleted the evidence, crossed the border, sat on a stage, and got read her own bigotry back to her by a prepared audience member. The uncle is a hero. ?‍♂️??? #LauraLoomer #IndiaTodayConclave #TheUncleIsAHero #InternetIsForever #DeletedTweets #AccountabilityTwitter #MarALago #ImmigrationPolicy #ReceiptsForever #YouCantDeleteThis
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: A dump for my fellow Sapphics
item.description:
I feel like this is a DEEP wound for a lot of us. Been through this multiple times myself. Bruh.
To be fair most of the time I just dress like Adam Sandler..
It's the autism, in my case...
The average lesbian experience..
two girls, chilling on the sofa, 5 feet apart cause they’re not gay
item.dc:creator: velvetthornweaver

item.title: Simone!
item.description: New OC Simone! She is the lead singer in her band. After she and her band finally get their big break and sign with a label, they are introduced to the other newly signed group, only to discover that their lead singer is her ex-boyfriend. MORE CHARACTERS COMING SOON! (Credit to my discord server friends for helping me with name suggestions! I post art and wips on there.)
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: He provided clothing, food, shelter, and paid for my education, as he did for some of those in my generation.
item.description: In my lifetime, the presidents who genuinely demonstrated love for this country were Kennedy, Johnson, Carter, and, surprisingly, Herbert Walker Bush. Good luck! Vote.gov anybody can get a mail-in ballot by saying they're sick; call your County seat. There's too much urgency not to vote. Apathy is no longer an. It's only been a year, change gears. The response now taking shape isn’t just political—it’s collective. It’s nurses, teachers, farmers, tech workers, seniors, immigrants—all rediscovering the power of us. Start simple: Register. Vote. Show up. Join a union and/or coalition. Back the fighters: •ACLU – Defending civil rights in every courtroom. https://aflcio.org/ •SEIU – Organizing service and care workers for fair pay. Indivisible – Mobilizing grassroots democracy advocates •NOW – Championing equality and reproductive justice. Public Citizen – Holding corporations and lobbyists accountable. •AFL‑CIO – Uniting workers across industries and states. •NEA – Standing up for public education and teachers. https://www.nea.org/ •MADRE – Advancing global women’s and human rights.https://www.madre.org/ •SPLC – Confronting hate groups and systemic injustice.https://www.splcenter.org/ •AARP – Fighting for dignity and security in aging.https://www.aarp.org/ https://mutualaidnetwork.org/ https://www.mutualaidhub.org/ https://olmsapps.dol.gov/query/getOrgQry.do https://ua.org/join-the-ua/find-a-local-union/ This is what democracy looks like when it remembers itself. They think 98% of us will quietly adapt to there propaganda. They're wrong. vote.gov https://rbreich.com/ top right menu videos
item.dc:creator: Shawnofavitch

item.title: I found these bottom shelf memes behind an abandoned Home Depot hidden deep in the forest.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
You like what you see? Thanks. I stole it all from discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
If you made it this far, then I assume you and I must have similar tastes in shitposting. Well, all these memes were stolen fair and square from discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka ..mostly stolen from @dot the BSC posting queen. Feel free to dive into the dumpster fire to steal and deal memes 24/7.
Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1639 (no bite)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I love Hooded Mergansers.
I do someday want to create a gin cocktail inspired by this bird....
Someone should make art of a giant pterosaur like Hatzegopteryx doing this.
Pippin, at least 50 percent of the time.
This is an adorable mental image.
Pippin tax (and Baja cameo again) Today's message from Pippin: "What are you doing? Good boy pippin!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Without one doubt
item.dc:creator: fallibledegenerate

item.title: She’s got a favorite position
item.description: My pregnant foster mama cat, Bobbie, is REALLY uncomfortable. Her new favorite thing to do is flop down next to me and I put my hand on her belly and she kicks her leg up onto my arm and curls her torso towards me. She’ll lay here for a while and then she’ll jump down to lay on the hardwood floor and then she’ll start meowing randomly and I’m like, oh, here we go! And then she yells at me for food and eats half a can. We’ve been doing this all night. I don’t think it’s gonna happen tonight but I’ll give it another episode of Scandal and then pass out for a bit. I’ll keep checking on her, though. And I may have to miss Dadurday tomorrow at my dad’s house. I’m sure he’ll understand.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Your religion prohibits me from nothing.
item.description: Would be real awesome if you go hit subscribe on my YouTube. Seriously, it gives me dopamine and motivates me! https://youtube.com/shorts/EOSsChP8Wq8 There is no hate like Christian love. Christians have done more harm to me than anybody else as far as the Abrahamic ideal is concerned

item.title: Dangit, Bobbie
item.description: I’ve been on high alert for Bobbie to give birth since 8:30pm and it is now 2:30am. Even KFD needs sleep. I think we’ve got at least 12-24 more hours before we have to really consider kittens. I won’t take my sleepy time meds, and I’ll set an alarm for every two hours to check the cameras. If she will just LET. ME. LEAVE Edit: woke up at 4:30 and 6:30 - still no babies
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Trump seeking asylum means the same thing as insane asylum
item.dc:creator: wafflesdidit

item.title: Hint: They’re in Mar A Lardo
item.description: “Having Iranian sleeper cells floating around the country is apparently no big deal to the president. Donald Trump told reporters Wednesday that he was well aware of the foreign chaos agents’ locations, though he didn’t express any immediate plans to do anything about it. Instead, he regurgitated his typical talking points, opting to heap responsibility for the problem onto President Joe Biden rather than address the potentially dangerous situation directly as America’s current leader.” “Have you been briefed about how many Iran sleeper cells there could be inside the U.S. right now?” asked a journalist. “I have been, and a lot of people came in through Biden with the stupid open border. But we know where most of them are, we’ve got our eye on all of them—I think,” Trump said. “They came in through the open border policies of sleepy Joe Biden, one of the worst—the worst president—in the history of our country.”” “We’ve got our eyes on all of them, but the war itself is being prosecuted at a level that nobody has seen before. It’s pretty amazing to watch,” Trump added”
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars
